title: Political rally in Supaul draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Supaul promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: High stakes battle in Supaul as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Supaul. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Welfare scheme execution becomes election issue in Supaul
snippet_text: Local reports indicate that MGNREGA work allocations and PMAY home delivery rates are taking center stage in public debates across Supaul assembly segment.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Supaul
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Supaul constituency.
